question: 2024年各统计层级中GDP同比为正的季度数据数量分别是多少？

question: 查询2024年消费支出高于各省平均水平1500亿元以上的省份
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT geo_name
FROM gdp_expenditure
WHERE year = 2024 AND geo_level = 'province'
GROUP BY geo_name
HAVING AVG(consumption_100m_cny) > (
  SELECT AVG(consumption_100m_cny)
  FROM gdp_expenditure
  WHERE year = 2024 AND geo_level = 'province'
) + 1500
ORDER BY AVG(consumption_100m_cny) DESC
answer: {"items": [{"name": "geo_name", "value": "广东"}, {"name": "geo_name", "value": "江苏"}, {"name": "geo_name", "value": "山东"}, {"name": "geo_name", "value": "浙江"}, {"name": "geo_name", "value": "四川"}, {"name": "geo_name", "value": "河南"}, {"name": "geo_name", "value": "湖北"}]}

question: 2018年至2024年期间，全国层级每年的地区GDP总量是多少亿元？
